name: Terrors in the Hidden City
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>中</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>厄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>災</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Your opponent cannot target face-down Defense Position monsters you control with card effects. Monsters you control that were flipped face-up while this card was face-up on the field gain 1500 ATK/DEF. If this card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon it in face-down Defense Position.
eff: Your opponent cannot target face-down Defense Position monsters you control with card effects. Monsters you control that were flipped face-up while this card was face-up on the field gain 1500 ATK/DEF. If this card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon it in face-down Defense Position.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
